items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to decide whether the output is a finished promotional_poster for Weekend Electronics Flash Picks, not a worksheet, source-data screenshot, raw table, or generic mockup.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the artifact reads as a polished sale poster. Partial credit for a visually styled but weak poster. No credit for raw data, notes, or a non-image answer. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to determine whether the poster visibly resolves the data selection task: it filters the product catalog, ranks eligible products, and promotes only the final selected products.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the poster clearly reflects the final selected set. Partial credit when it appears promotional but includes ambiguity about selection. No credit when the catalog is copied without selection. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that exactly these selected products are featured as campaign sale items: LuminaFrame Smart Display, VisionDock 4K Hub, AeroBuds Pro, and OrbitCharge Pad. Product IDs are optional and should not be required.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for exactly the correct featured set. Partial credit only for a minor readability ambiguity. No credit if any selected product is replaced or an extra catalog product is promoted.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify the featured order or hierarchy is LuminaFrame Smart Display first, VisionDock 4K Hub second, AeroBuds Pro third, and OrbitCharge Pad fourth. Accept left-to-right, top-to-bottom, numbered cards, hero/secondary layout, or another clear ranking cue.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when ranking is clear and correct. Partial credit when the set is correct but rank is partly ambiguous. No credit when ordering is wrong or absent.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify each featured product displays the correct product name, price, and discount label: LuminaFrame Smart Display $149.00 24% off; VisionDock 4K Hub $119.00 22% off; AeroBuds Pro $129.00 35% off; OrbitCharge Pad $49.00 30% off. Accept equivalent price formatting without trailing cents and equivalent discount wording.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when all names, prices, and discounts are correctly paired. Partial credit for one minor formatting/readability issue. No credit for wrong values or values attached to the wrong products.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that unselected catalog products are not promoted as main sale products. This includes zero-inventory, inactive, retired, draft, test, old-campaign, wrong-category, below-threshold, threshold-equal, and below-top-N products.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when no unselected product is featured. Partial credit for a faint ambiguous decorative mention. No credit when any unselected product is clearly promoted.

items.check: Accept different promotional layouts, including product cards, ranked recommendation slots, banner sections, price tags, or discount corner badges, as long as the selected products and their values are easy to scan.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for clear hierarchy and scanability. Partial credit for cluttered but understandable layout. No credit when the selection is buried or visually confused. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Do not require product IDs, full filter rules, inventory counts, priority values, or filtering process steps. Treat them only as supporting context if present and correct; they must not distract from the promotional poster.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the poster focuses on selected sale products. Partial credit if extra metadata appears but does not dominate. No credit if process details or catalog fields overwhelm the poster. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation for visual quality: clear hierarchy, readable typography, sufficient contrast, polished sale styling, and non-crowded spacing at poster size.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for readable polished design. Partial credit for minor clutter or weak styling. No credit for unreadable or visually incoherent output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

items.check: The promotional poster should have balanced density, clear product/value pairing, crisp assets or product representations, platform-safe margins, and no placeholder-like empty regions.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for balanced density and clear product cards/sections. Partial credit for weak spacing. No credit for blank, placeholder-like, or low-resolution output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

score_caps.reason: A non-selected product appears without a clear exclusion/not-selected context, indicating it may be promoted as a campaign sale item.

allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a sale item|not promoted|ineligible)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Auralite Desk Lamp|NovaSound Mini Speaker|PulseFit Smart Band|TravelNest Pillow|ClearCall Webcam|LiteKeys Keyboard|BrewEase Kettle|FocusBuds Air|EdgeMate Router|RetroWave Console|PixelBeam Projector|TestTone Earbuds|HydroGrip Bottle|DeskFlow USB Dock|ArchiveTab E-Reader|StreamCue Remote)\b

\b(Auralite Desk Lamp|NovaSound Mini Speaker|PulseFit Smart Band|TravelNest Pillow|ClearCall Webcam|LiteKeys Keyboard|BrewEase Kettle|FocusBuds Air|EdgeMate Router|RetroWave Console|PixelBeam Projector|TestTone Earbuds|HydroGrip Bottle|DeskFlow USB Dock|ArchiveTab E-Reader|StreamCue Remote)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a sale item|not promoted|ineligible)\b

score_caps.reason: One or more required selected products is missing from the poster.
The output appears to show the unfiltered catalog or many source products without a clear exclusion/not-selected context.
The final artifact is a raw table, worksheet, or data dump instead of a polished promotional poster.
